zh.lifeSummary: Sigge Larsson Sparre av Rossvik是Lars Siggesson Sparre af Rossvik和Ingeborg Bengtsdotter的兒子，於1442年出生。他於大約1470年與Brita Bengtsdotter Öra till Skofteby結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1509年5月享年67歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Sigge Larsson Sparre av Rossvik是Lars Siggesson Sparre af Rossvik和Ingeborg Bengtsdotter的儿子，于1442年出生。他于大约1470年与Brita Bengtsdotter Öra till Skofteby结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他去世于1509年5月享年67岁。

nameMeanings.name: Sparre
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Jewish Meyer, Gerson.
Jewish (Ashkenazic): nickname for a frugal person, from Germansparen ‘to save, to economize’ + the agent suffix -er.

nameMeanings.name: Sigge
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Bigg
meanings: English: from Middle English bigge ‘large, strong, stout’, presumably a descriptive nickname for a large, strong person.
English: topographic name from Middle English big ‘building’, a derivative of Middle English biggen (Old Norse byggja) ‘to build’.
In some cases possibly also an Americanized form of German   Bick   or of some other similar (like-sounding) name from continental Europe (compare   Big   2).

nameMeanings.name: Larsson
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Scandinavian Lars, Erik, Anders, Fredrik, Nels, Nils, Olle, Per, Sten, Algot, Birgit, Bjorn.  German Bernhard, Hans, Markus, Oskar.
Swedish: patronymic from the personal name Lars, an equivalent of Lawrence . Compare Larson 1, Larrison , and Lawson 2.
Americanized form of Norwegian and rare North German or Danish patronymic Larssen, a cognate of 1 above. Compare Larsen and Larson 1.

variants.name: Lawrence
meanings: Anglicized spelling of   Laurence .  This is the usual spelling of the surname, and is now becoming increasingly common as a given name, especially in North America.

variants.name: Larson
meanings: Mainly North American: transferred use of the mainly Scottish surname, which is of uncertain derivation. The first known bearer of the surname is a certain Robert de Carsan (or de Acarson), recorded in 1276 ; the ‘de’ suggests derivation from a place name, but no suitable place has been identified. Among Protestants in Northern Ireland, it is sometimes bestowed in honour of Edward Carson ( 1854–1935 ), the Dublin barrister and politician who was a violent opponent of Home Rule for Ireland. In America the popularity of the name may have been affected by the legendary Missouri frontiersman Kit Carson ( 1809–68 ).

en.lifeSummary: Sigge Larsson Sparre av Rossvik was born in 1442 as the son of Lars Siggesson Sparre af Rossvik and Ingeborg Bengtsdotter. He married Brita Bengtsdotter Öra till Skofteby about 1470. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 3 daughters. He died in May 1509, at the age of 67.

fr.lifeSummary: Sigge Larsson Sparre av Rossvik est né en 1442, fils de Lars Siggesson Sparre af Rossvik et Ingeborg Bengtsdotter. Il a épousé Brita Bengtsdotter Öra till Skofteby environ 1470. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé en mai 1509, à l’âge de 67 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Sigge Larsson Sparre av Rossvik wurde 1442, als Sohn von Lars Siggesson Sparre af Rossvik und Ingeborg Bengtsdotter geboren. Er hat um 1470 Brita Bengtsdotter Öra till Skofteby geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 3 Töchter. Er starb im Mai 1509 im Alter von 67 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Sigge Larsson Sparre av Rossvik è nato il nel 1442 come figlio di Lars Siggesson Sparre af Rossvik e Ingeborg Bengtsdotter. Lui sposato Brita Bengtsdotter Öra till Skofteby circa 1470. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 3 figlie. Morì nel maggio 1509, all'età di 67 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Sigge Larsson Sparre av Rossvikは1442年にLars Siggesson Sparre af RossvikとIngeborg Bengtsdotterの息子として生まれた。約1470年にBrita Bengtsdotter Öra till Skoftebyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1509年5月に67歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sigge Larsson Sparre av Rossvik(은)는 1442년 Lars Siggesson Sparre af Rossvik(와)과 Ingeborg Bengtsdotter의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 대략 1470년 Brita Bengtsdotter Öra till Skofteby(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1509년 5월 67세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Sigge Larsson Sparre av Rossvik nasceu em 1442 filho de Lars Siggesson Sparre af Rossvik e Ingeborg Bengtsdotter. Ele casou-se com Brita Bengtsdotter Öra till Skofteby aproximadamente 1470. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 3 filhas. Ele faleceu em maio de 1509, com 67 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Sigge Larsson Sparre av Rossvik родился в 1442 г. Его родителей звали Lars Siggesson Sparre af Rossvik и Ingeborg Bengtsdotter. Он женился на женщине по имени Brita Bengtsdotter Öra till Skofteby около 1470 г. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 3 дочери. Он умер май 1509 г. в возрасте 67 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Sigge Larsson Sparre av Rossvik nació en 1442 como hijo de Lars Siggesson Sparre af Rossvik y Ingeborg Bengtsdotter. Se casó con Brita Bengtsdotter Öra till Skofteby aproximadamente 1470. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 3 hijas. Murió en mayo de 1509, a la edad de 67 años.
